nodes.label: A :class:`TerminalInstance` flagged running, bypassing real tmux.      :param na
Patch tmux attach spawn at the bridge boundary.
With a running registry entry, the runner spawns ``tmux attach``     against the
``?transport=control`` dispatches to the control-mode bridge, not the PTY one.
An unknown terminal id closes with 4404.      :param tmp_path: Pytest tmp direct
A registry entry with ``running=False`` closes with 4404.      Defunct entries e
A stale ``running=True`` flag still closes with 4404 when tmux is gone.      Thi
A dead embedded REPL terminal is recreated on attach, not rejected.      Pins th
A dead qwen-native terminal is recreated on attach, not rejected.      Pins the
Recreate-on-attach is scoped to the REPL role — other dead     terminals keep th
Without a registry wired in, the endpoint closes 4404 rather     than crashing.
PTY EOF mid-attach surfaces as 4404, not as a normal close.      Models the user
